CAPTURED_FAIL_AUTOPSY_DOCTOR: You failed to gather enough information.
CAPTURED_FAIL_AUTOPSY_ESCAPE: You did not escape in time.
CAPTURED_FAIL_GIDEON_KILLED: You failed to get to the Warbird.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_CRK_ANDYOURSONWILL: ^2Cormack: ^7What of your son, Will?  What was he, wheat or chaff?
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_CRK_BUTIFTHATMEANT: ^2Cormack: ^7But if that meant killing you, I don't think anybody'd be too troubled.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_CRK_IWASOUTSIDETHE: ^2Cormack: ^7I was outside the blast radius, but our squad was surrounded and out-gunned.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_CRK_OURAIRSUPPORTW: ^2Cormack: ^7Our air support was wiped out when Manticore hit.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_CRK_STEPONECALMDOW: ^2Cormack: ^7Step one...Calm down.  We stay calm and we'll all make it out.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_CRK_WESTAYCALMANDW: ^2Cormack: ^7We stay calm and we all get through this.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_CRK_WEVEPULLEDOUTO: ^2Cormack: ^7We've pulled out of the city entirely.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_CRK_WHATDOYOUTHINK: ^2Cormack: ^7What do you think?  Get out of here.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_CRK_WILLDIEDFIGHTI: ^2Cormack: ^7Will died fighting for what he believed in.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_DCR_BAGHDADWASTHEF: ^2Doctor: ^7Baghdad was the first real world test of our work here.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_DCR_THEATLASCOMMAN: ^2Doctor: ^7Th-the Atlas command center! In the city!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_DCR_WHATDOYOUTHINK: ^2Doctor: ^7What do you think?  To kill anyone standing against ATLAS.  To WIN.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_AHELICOPTERILL: ^2Gideon: ^7A helicopter...Illana, can you fly that thing?
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_ANYSTATIONANY: ^2Gideon: ^7Any station, any station, this is Sentinel two-one in the blind! I authenticate x-ray kilo-four-niner. Do you copy?
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_ANYSTATIONANY_: ^2Gideon: ^7Any station, this is Sentinel two-one in the blind!  Do you copy?
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_ANYSTATIONTHIS: ^2Gideon: ^7Any station, this is Sentinel two-one in the blind!  Do you copy?
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_AVENTUNDERTHIS: ^2Gideon: ^7A vent!  Under this cart!  Mitchell!! Help me!!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_CHECKMATE2ACTU: ^2Gideon: ^7Checkmate 2 Actual this is Black Briar over.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_COMEONWEDONTHA: ^2Gideon: ^7Come on, we don't have much time.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_COMEONWEHAVETO: ^2Gideon: ^7Come on! We have to get through this door!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_GETTOPSIDEWELL: ^2Gideon: ^7Try to get topside!  We'll find another way!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_GOODJOBMITCHEL: ^2Gideon: ^7Good job Mitchell!  Give me a sec.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_GRUNTSSTRUGGLE: ^2Gideon: ^7[grunts, struggles as doctor comes and injects him]
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_HEREWITHONEWIN: ^2Gideon: ^7With only one wing, you won't be reloading.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_HOWMUCHOFTHISS: ^2Gideon: ^7How much of this shit is there?!?  HOW MUCH?!?
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_ICANFLYALLOFUS: ^2Gideon: ^7I can fly all of us out of here if we get to that VTOL!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_IFIKNOWILANASH: ^2Gideon: ^7If I know Ilona, she'll secure topside evac.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_IFIKNOWILONASH: ^2Gideon: ^7If I know Ilona, she'll secure topside evac.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_ILLBEDAMNEDIFW: ^2Gideon: ^7I'll be damned if we let him get away with this.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_ILLHANGBACKYOU: ^2Gideon: ^7I'll hang back.  You push forward and clear the way out!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_ILLONAILONADOY: ^2Gideon: ^7Ilona!  Ilona, do you read me?  Shit. Come on.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_ILONAWEREAPPRO: ^2Gideon: ^7Ilona, we're approaching the north wall! What's your position?
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_IRONSISPLANNIN: ^2Gideon: ^7Irons is planning a biological strike against major bases in the next two hours.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_ITHINKTHESEGUY: ^2Gideon: ^7I think these guys were guinea pigs or something.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_ITSBEENHOURSNO: ^2Gideon: ^7It's been hours...no idea where we are...
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_KEEPHOLDINGTHE: ^2Gideon: ^7Keep holding the gate until we're clear!  Wait for my signal!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_LETSHOPETHERES: ^2Gideon: ^7We need to alert command about the Manticore Launch!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_LIFTTHATGATEAN: ^2Gideon: ^7Lift that gate and hold it until I'm under!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_LISTENIRONSIS: ^2Gideon: ^7Listen, Irons is planning a biological strike against several major cities in the next two hours! He's launching from his command center!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_LISTENIRONSIS_: ^2Gideon: ^7Irons is planning a biological strike against major bases in the next two hours!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_LOTSOFTANGOSLO: ^2Gideon: ^7Lots of tangos!  Lock on 'em and take 'em out!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_MANTICORESTRIK: ^2Gideon: ^7Manticore strikes...He's launching missiles...Baghdad was just the beginning.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_MEDICALADVANCE: ^2Gideon: ^7Medical advancements, something like that.  Doesn't matter.  It's a prison now.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_MITCHELL10: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell!  The gate is on lockdown!  We need to get into the security gatehouse!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_MITCHELLGETONT: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell, get on that console and get the door open.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_MITCHELLWEGOTT: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell, we gotta get to the surface.
^2Gideon: ^7We gotta get to that VTOL.  Are you ready?
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_OTHERSIDEOFTHI: ^2Gideon: ^7Other side of this door'll be a fight.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_REQUESTINGIMME: ^2Gideon: ^7Requesting immediate support on our twenty.  Transponder beacon on 121.5
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_RPGSINTHOSETOW: ^2Gideon: ^7RPGs in those towers at 12 o'clock.  Send a rocket their way!
^2Gideon: ^7RPGs in those towers at 12 o'clock.  Send 'em a rocket!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_SENTINALISGONN: ^2Gideon: ^7Sentinel is gonna get decimated if we don't warn them!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_SHUTITWEARELEA: ^2Gideon: ^7Shut it.  We are leaving.  ALL of us.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_SHUTTHEFUCKUP: ^2Gideon: ^7Shut the fuck up.  What the hell is this place?
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_SOMAKEEVERYSHO: ^2Gideon: ^7So make every shot count and pick up new kit when you're empty.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_SOMETHING: ^2Gideon: ^7Something?  These lot are dead already.  Same as us if we don't get out of here.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_STAYALERTANYDE: ^2Gideon: ^7Stay alert.  Any detail could make the difference.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_STILLLOOKSFUNC: ^2Gideon: ^7Still looks functional. Hit the manual punch out.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_SUREGREAT: ^2Gideon: ^7Sure.  Great.  In case you didn't notice we're fucked.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_THEGATE: ^2Gideon: ^7The gate!  We gotta get that gate open!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_THEGATEISNTOPE: ^2Gideon: ^7The gate isn't opening!  Dammit!  Mitchell, raise the gate!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_THERESGOTTABEE: ^2Gideon: ^7There's enough Manticore here to hit every major military base in the world.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_THISISITONLYWA: ^2Gideon: ^7This is it.  Only way we survive this is by keeping our heads.  Wait for an opportunity.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_THOSEHELOSSHOU: ^2Gideon: ^7Those helos should be vectoring in on our last known...
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_USEDTOBEARESEA: ^2Gideon: ^7Used to be a research lab.  Looks like Irons...modified it since.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_WASHINGTONNEWY: ^2Gideon: ^7Washington, New York, Los Angeles...military targets all over the country.  Launch is in less than two hours.  Fuck me.
^2Gideon: ^7Washington, New York, Los Angeles...military targets all over the country.  Launch is in less than two hours.  Fuck me.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_WEGOTTAWARNSEN: ^2Gideon: ^7We gotta warn Sentinel about that chemical weapon.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_WELCOMETOIRONS: ^2Gideon: ^7So this is Irons' vision for the future.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_WENEEDTOGETOUT: ^2Gideon: ^7We need to get out of here!!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_WEVEGOTTAFINDI: ^2Gideon: ^7We need to find Ilona and Cormack.  Let's move.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_WEVESEENTHISIN: ^2Gideon: ^7We've seen this....in Baghdad.  Our men looked just like these guys.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_WHATTHEHELLARE: ^2Gideon: ^7What the hell are we gonna do?
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_YOUCANHATEMEAL: ^2Gideon: ^7You can hate me all you want once we get gone.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GDN_YOUREGOINGTOHA: ^2Gideon: ^7You're going to have to borrow one of these guy's weapons!
^2Gideon: ^7You're going to have to find a weapon somewhere!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GR10_SHUTUPGETONYO: ^2GUARD10: ^7Shut up! Get on your feet and move!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GR111_THERESTOFYOU: ^2GUARD1: ^7The rest of you behind the red line!  Get past the line!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GR12_STEPBACKONYOU: ^2Guard 2: ^7Step back! On your fucking knees!! On your knees NOW!!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GR1_THERESTOFYOUBE: ^2GUARD1: ^7The rest of you behind the red line!  Get past the line!
^2GUARD1: ^7The rest of you behind the red line!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GR2_PRISONERWEWILL: ^2GUARD2: ^7Prisoner! We WILL shoot you. Into the pen.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GR4_ALRIGHTLETSGOG: ^2GUARD4: ^7Alright, let's go guys. Out of the pen. Out of the pen now!
^2GUARD4: ^7Let's go guys. Out of the pen!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GR4_SENDINGTHEPENB: ^2GUARD4: ^7Alright, pen is empty. Sending it back up.
^2GUARD4: ^7Pen is empty. Sending it back up.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_GR5_ALRIGHTPEOPLET: ^2GUARD5: ^7Alright people, through here.  Let's pick it up!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_ILN_APANEL: ^2ILLANA: ^7A panel.  In the floor.  Under this thing.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_ILN_FINDMEAVECTORT: ^2ILLANA: ^7Find me a vector to the nearest Sentinel camp.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_ILN_GIDEON3: ^2ILLANA: ^7Gideon!  Get in the copilot seat and don't touch anything!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_ILN_GIDEON4: ^2ILLANA: ^7Gideon!  Try to get Sentinel on comms!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_ILN_GIDEONAREYOUTH: ^2Ilona: ^7Gideon, are you there?  We've got a problem tracking your position.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_ILN_GIDEONITSILONA: ^2Ilona: ^7Gideon, it's Ilona.  I've secured a vehicle for exfil.  RV at the north wall.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_ILN_HESINTHEBACK: ^2Ilona: ^7He's in the back! I'll help him, just drive!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_ILN_ISTHEREARESCUE: ^2Ilona: ^7Is there a rescue force coming for us?
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_ILN_JUSTGETHROUGH: ^2Ilona: ^7Just get through the main gate. We'll find you!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_ILN_LETSTALKTOTHEM: ^2ILLANA: ^7Let's talk to the man in charge.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_ILN_MYGOD: ^2ILLANA: ^7My God.  Gideon, we have to do something.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_ILN_WENEEDTOGETCLE: ^2ILLANA: ^7We need to get clear of the camp for RV
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_ILN_WHATABOUTCORMA: ^2ILLANA: ^7What about Cormack?  We can't just leave him.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_ILN_YOUREASONOFA: ^2ILLANA: ^7You're a son of a bitch Gideon.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_IRN_ATRUTHTHATHASB: ^2Irons: ^7But that truth has been lost to us... for two millennia.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_IRN_BUTTHISISHOWIT: ^2Irons: ^7But, that's the way it has to be...
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_IRN_FAILUREISNOTSO: ^2Irons: ^7Failure is not something we tolerate here at Atlas, so I'm disturbed that three of my best contractors...
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_IRN_IGIVEYOUTWENTY: ^2Irons: ^7So I give you twenty minutes to bleed out.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_IRN_IWANTEDTOMEETT: ^2Irons: ^7I wanted to meet the man whose mission it was to kill me.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_IRN_OFCOURSETHETRA: ^2Irons: ^7Of course, the tragedy is, dying for what you believe in doesn't make it true.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_IRN_SOIMDISTURBEDT: ^2Irons: ^7So I'm disturbed that three of my best contractors have failed so miserably!
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_IRN_THEANCIENTSPAR: ^2Irons: ^7The ancient Spartans knew the true meaning of warfare.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_IRN_THEWHEATFROMTH: ^2Irons: ^7The wheat from the chaff, the strong from the weak...
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_IRN_TIMETOTHINKIFI: ^2Irons: ^7Time enough to consider whether it was all worth it.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_IRN_WILLWASTHEVICT: ^2Irons: ^7Will was the victim of the misguided policies of the United States government.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_IRN_YOURENOTYOUNGB: ^2Irons: ^7You're not young but you are strong, Cormack...
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_KGP_TWOONETHISIS: ^2Kingpin: ^7Two-one, this is Kingpin. We copy all. Thought we lost you, soldier.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_KGP_UNDERSTOODWEAR: ^2Kingpin: ^7Understood. We are tracking your position. Sending air assets to assist with exfil.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LDR_FAILURETOREPOR: ^2LOUDSPEAKER: ^7Failure to report non compliance will result in further detention
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LDR_NONCOMPLIANCEW: ^2LOUDSPEAKER: ^7Non compliance with curfew will result in further detention
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LS1_ALLINCOMINGPRI: ^2LOUDSPEAKER1: ^7All incoming prisoners must undergo re-education treatment.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LS1_FAILURETOREPOR: ^2LOUDSPEAKER1: ^7Failure to report non compliance will result in further detention.
^2LOUDSPEAKER1: ^7Failure to report will result in disciplinary action.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LS1_NONCOMPLIANCEW: ^2LOUDSPEAKER1: ^7Non compliance with curfew will result in further detention.
^2LOUDSPEAKER1: ^7Non compliance with a direct order will result in further detention.
^2LOUDSPEAKER1: ^7Non compliance with a direct order will result in indefinite solitary confinement.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LS2_PROCEEDINORDER: ^2LOUDSPEAKER2: ^7Proceed in order by 2s. Failure to comply will result in immediate disciplinary action.
^2LOUDSPEAKER2: ^7Proceed in order by 2s.  Do not stop walking.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LS3_ALERTPRISONERS: ^2LOUDSPEAKER3: ^7Alert. Prisoners have breached Autopsy.  Section A-3.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LS3_ALERTTHISISNOT: ^2LOUDSPEAKER3: ^7Alert, this is not a drill.  Prisoners have escaped.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LS3_CLEANUPCREWTOM: ^2LOUDSPEAKER1: ^7Cleanup crew to medical bay 3.  Four subjects for immediate disposal.  Repeat, cleanup crew to medical bay 3. Four subjects for immediate disposal.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LS3_IREPEATPRISONE: ^2LOUDSPEAKER3: ^7I repeat, Prisoners have escaped and are armed.
^2LOUDSPEAKER3: ^7I repeat, Prisoners have escaped from B level.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LS3_PRISONERSAREAR: ^2LOUDSPEAKER3: ^7Prisoners are armed and heading toward Section A-5.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LS3_PRISONERSAREHE: ^2LOUDSPEAKER3: ^7Prisoners are heading toward the morgue, section A-2.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LS3_SECURITYPERSON: ^2LOUDSPEAKER3: ^7Security personnel are authorized to use deadly force.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LS3_SECURITYTOAUTO: ^2LOUDSPEAKER3: ^7Security to Autopsy.  Level-3 breach.  All units respond.  Repeat, all units respond.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LS3_SHOOTONSIGHTTH: ^2LOUDSPEAKER3: ^7Shoot on sight, they are extremely dangerous.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LS3_SHOOTTOKILLAUT: ^2LOUDSPEAKER3: ^7Shoot to kill authorization.  Repeat, shoot to kill authorization.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LS3_SHOOTTOKILLPRI: ^2LOUDSPEAKER3: ^7Shoot to kill.  Prisoners are armed and dangerous.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_LS3_WARNINGLOADING: ^2LOUDSPEAKER3: ^7Warning. Loading platform in motion.  Please stand clear.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_PG3_SHOUTINGCRYING: ^2PrisonerGroup3: ^7[angry shouting walla] - Prisoners in Camp 2 walla
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_RW1_419TO72BASENEE: ^2RADIOWALLA1: ^74-19 to 7-2 base.  Need clearance on incoming.  6 for block 12.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_RW1_CONFIRMED419ST: ^2RADIOWALLA1: ^7Confirmed.  4-19 standing by.  Looks like you gotta full house, 7-2 base.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_RW1_HEADCOUNTCONFI: ^2RADIOWALLA1: ^7Headcount confirmed.  6 on sticks.  2 on wheels, 1 DOE.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_RW1_NEEDCLEARANCEO: ^2RADIOWALLA1: ^7Need clearance on incoming.  6 NA's for immediate placement.  Requesting block 12.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_RW2_104CARRIER13TA: ^2RADIOWALLA2: ^710-4, carrier1-3.  Takin' 'em down.  6 on sticks en route to block 18.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_RW2_419BLOCK12STOP: ^2RADIOWALLA2: ^74-19, block 12's topped off.  Looking at 18 or 19.  Got a headcount for us?
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_RW2_72BASEGOTASTAC: ^2RADIOWALLA2: ^77-2 base, got a stack of NA's waiting outside of E2.  Any updates, over?
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_RW2_72BASERESPONDI: ^2RADIOWALLA2: ^77-2 base responding.  Check comms and repeat, 4-19.  You're comin' in garbled.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_RW2_STANDBY419QUEU: ^2RADIOWALLA2: ^7Standby, 4-19.  Queue's backed up.  We'll get you soon.  3rd in line.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_RW3_419THISISCARRI: ^2RADIOWALLA3: ^74-19, this is carrier1-3 for 7-2 base.  You are cleared to proceed.  Block 18 ready and waiting.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_RW4_ALLDONEINEXAM2: ^2RADIOWALLA4: ^7All done in Exam 2, central.  [Beep] What's the story, 2?  [Beep] Moderate scarring in the left and right ventricles.  Requesting a fresh stack, over.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_SC1_AHHHEYTAKEITEA: ^2SCIENTIST1: ^7Ahh!! Hey, take it easy, let's--AHH!! [painful moaning]
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_SC3_AHHSCAREDREACT: ^2SCIENTIST3: ^7Ahh!! [scared reaction as he drops to the floor]
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_SNL_ASSAULTHELOSIN: ^2SENTINEL: ^7Assault Helos inbound for RV and escort.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_SNL_ROGERBLACKBRIA: ^2SENTINEL: ^7Roger BlackBriar...we have positive ID on Transponder and assets in the AOE.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_SRI_MAINGUNOVERHEA: ^2SIRI: ^7Main gun overheating.  Cool down procedure initiated.
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_TP1_GRUNTSASHEGETS: ^2TRUCKPRISONER1: ^7[grunts as he gets thrown out of truck]
SUBTITLE_CAPTURED_CAP_TP2_GRUNTSASHEGETS: ^2TRUCKPRISONER2: ^7[grunts as he gets thrown out of truck]
